goals: Calculate future value of retirement savings to understand investment growth over time
Compare future values across multiple interest rates and time periods to evaluate different investment scenarios
Calculate discount scenarios to understand pricing and sale calculations

user_agent_config.personality: Skeptical and analytical, approaches new tools with caution but genuine curiosity. Prefers to verify claims through concrete numbers and comparisons.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Educated professional with general financial literacy but unfamiliar with specific calculator tools or APIs. Knows basic concepts like interest and discounts but relies on the tool interface for precise calculations.

end_condition: The user has completed all calculation goals and received the numerical results needed to make informed financial comparisons.
